programme.title: Robin Hood: Men In Tights
programme.desc: Robin of Loxley, a handsome medieval knight, comes home early from the Crusades to defend England against a hostile takeover.

programme.title: The Benchwarmers
programme.desc: Three older guys get to fulfil their childhood sporting dreams becoming heroes to the bullied, clumsy and athletically-challenged everywhere.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Archaeologists awaken an Egyptian priest mummified alive 36 centuries ago for killing Pharaoh Seti and sleeping with his mistress. When he escapes from the tomb, he becomes a threat to the world.

programme.title: The Invitation
programme.desc: An unknown cousin invites Evie to a lavish wedding in the countryside. Soon she realises a conspiracy is afoot and must fight for survival as she uncovers secrets in her family's history.

programme.desc: Set in 1998, this origin story explores the secrets of the mysterious Spencer Mansion and the ill-fated Raccoon City.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: MI6's most lethal assassin is sent on a covert mission into Cold War Berlin where she must use all of the spy-craft, sensuality, and savagery she has to stay alive.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Born in hell and bred to be evil, Hellboy was rescued by a benevolent doctor who raised him to be a hero. Now he must thwart a madman who wants to steal his powers and destroy mankind.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb Of The Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: In the Far East, Alex O'Connell, the son of famed mummy fighters Rick and Evy O'Connell, unearths the mummy of the first Emperor of Qin - a shape-shifting entity cursed by a witch centuries ago.

programme.title: War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Aliens have come to Earth in masses to destroy the planet. As they plough through the country in a wave of mass destruction and violence, a man must come to the defence of his estranged children.

programme.title: Warcraft: The Beginning
programme.desc: An epic adventure that sees a peaceful realm on the brink of war. Two heroes will be set on a collision course that will decide the fate of their family, their people and their home.

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: The mummified body of Imhotep is shipped to a museum in London, where he once again wakes and begins his campaign of rage and terror.

programme.title: The Fate Of The Furious
programme.desc: When a mysterious woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray his crew, the globetrotting team faces an unexpected challenge. Now they must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop her from unleashing chaos on a grand scale.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: For the third time, Detroit cop Axel Foley returns to Beverly Hills, this time to track down bad guys at an amusement park.

programme.title: White House Down
programme.desc: After being denied his dream job with the Secret Service, a cop with a bad attitude must save his daughter and the President after heavily armed militants take over the White House.

programme.title: Transformers: Dark Of The Moon
programme.desc: An event from Earth's past threatens to ignite a war so big that the Transformers alone will not be able to save the planet.

programme.title: Transformers: Age Of Extinction
programme.desc: Humans come to realise that their new war against the Autobots could end with their own extinction when a threat more powerful than anything they have ever imagined presents itself.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: Based on the hit 90s animation, the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles are back and have teamed up with news reporter April O'Neill to save New York City against the evil Shredder.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: As war rages in Europe, a Nazi-scalping squad of American soldiers, known to their enemy as The Basterds, is on a daring mission to take down the leaders of the Third Reich.

programme.title: Transformers: The Last Knight
programme.desc: Humans are at war with the Transformers, and Optimus Prime is gone. It's now up to an unlikely alliance.

programme.title: R.I.P.D.
programme.desc: After a cop is murdered by his partner, he ends up in the afterlife, where he joins a special police force protecting the living from souls that refuse to leave. He teams up with a former Old West sheriff to stop his partner from destroying the world.

programme.title: Fast & Furious
programme.desc: Two rivals reunite in Los Angeles when a crime brings them face to face again. Forced to work together against a shared enemy, they push their limits behind the wheel in a high-stakes chase for revenge.

programme.title: Indiana Jones: Kingdom of Crystal Skull
programme.desc: Back in a new globe-trotting adventure, the Soviets kidnap Indiana in Mexico as they plot to harness the power of the Crystal Skull of Akator in the Cold War.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: In ancient China, a group of European mercenaries encounters a secret army that maintains and defends the Great Wall of China against a horde of monstrous creatures.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War
programme.desc: After a devastating betrayal, kind-hearted Queen Freya unleashes dark powers and wages war on love, claiming warriors Eric and Sara as victims.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: Hobbs and Shaw, the trash-talking sworn enemies must team up to take down a cyber-genetically enhanced anarchist with a bio weapon that threatens the fate of humanity.

programme.title: Pain & Gain
programme.desc: Based on the unbelievable true story: a group of personal trainers in 1990s Miami, who in pursuit of the American dream, get caught up in a criminal enterprise that goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol
programme.desc: The IMF is shut down when it's implicated in the bombing of the Kremlin, causing Ethan Hunt and his new team to go rogue to clear their organisation's name.

programme.title: Snow White And The Huntsman
programme.desc: In a twist to the fairy tale, the evil Queen Ravenna orders the Huntsman to capture Snow White so she can rule eternally; however, he trains her in the art of war to defeat the wicked ruler.

programme.title: Ghost Rider
programme.desc: When motorcycle rider Johnny Blaze sells his soul to the Devil to save his father's life, he is transformed into the Ghost Rider, the Devil's own bounty hunter, and is sent to hunt down sinners.

programme.title: A Quiet Place
programme.desc: A family must navigate their lives in silence to avoid mysterious creatures that hunt by sound.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: A security repairman stationed on a desolate future Earth rescues a beautiful stranger from a downed spacecraft. Her arrival will trigger a chain of events that will leave man's fate in his hands.

programme.desc: When genetically modified dinosaurs run amok at a new themed resort, a former military man and animal expert must use his special skills to halt an all-out prehistoric slaughter.

programme.title: The Huntsman: Winter's War

programme.desc: Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of death-defying adrenaline junkies on a mission to kick some ass.

programme.title: Back To The Future
programme.desc: Marty, a typical teen, is accidentally sent back to 1955 in a plutonium-powered time machine. Marty must make sure his teenage parents-to-be meet and fall in love so he can get back to the future.

programme.title: Back To The Future Part II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Back To The Future Part III
programme.desc: Marty McFly ends up in the wild west of 1885 to save mad scientist Doc Brown from a crazed gunfighter. It's the final chapter in the time-travelling comedy series.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reunited, the team pieces together the cause of a mysterious explosion at a trailer park, how a stripper ended dead in a street wearing a shopping bag, and how two bodies turned into soup in a trunk.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The pursuit of the American dream leaves a movie star and several immigrant laundry workers dead, in a dark upstairs-downstairs look at the glitter and grime of Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman found dead on the staircase in her suburban home. Suspicion quickly falls on the victim's husband, but the blood spatter evidence tells a different story.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An intruder with a jones for junk food breaks into a residence while a dead body is dumped in the backyard, leading the CSIs to investigate a cult.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick, Warrick, Sara and Greg are sent to eastern Nevada to investigate the disappearance of an entire family.

programme.title: Wild Target
programme.desc: Bill Nighy is Victor Maynard, a middle-aged, solitary assassin, who lives to please his formidable mother, Louisa (Eileen Atkins), despite his own peerless reputation for lethal efficiency. His professional routine is interrupted when he finds himself drawn to one of his intended victims, Rose (Emily Blunt). He spares her life, unexpectedly acquiring a young apprentice in the process, Tony (Rupert Grint). Believing Victor to be a private detective, his two new companions tag along, while he attempts to thwart the murderous attentions of his unhappy client (Rupert Everett).
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are two girls who like to party - drink, drugs and general debauchery infuse their days while their careers and lives remain on hold. As they drift into their thirties, reality begins to bite, but Laura and Tyler will not be tamed so easily. When aspiring writer Laura (Holliday Grainger) meets the devilishly handsome musician Jim, sparks fly. As their relationship intensifies, Laura's friendship with Tyler (Alia Shawkat) comes under pressure; Tyler wants to keep the party going, living a life without limitation as Laura begins to settle into her relationship with Jim.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: Detective Inspector John Kildare (Bill Nighy) is assigned to the case of the Limehouse Golem – a nefarious, calculating serial killer, murdering innocent, unconnected victims, leaving behind barely identifiable corpses – and his distinctive signature in blood. All is not what it seems and everyone is a suspect and everyone has a secret.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Iron Lady
programme.desc: The Iron Lady, starring Meryl Streep, tells the compelling story of Margaret Thatcher, a woman who smashed through the barriers of gender and class to be heard in a male-dominated world. The story concerns power and the price that is paid for power, and is a surprising and intimate portrait of an extraordinary and complex woman.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: McLaren
programme.desc: The story of Bruce McLaren, the New Zealander who showed the world that a man of humble beginnings could take on the elite of motor racing and win.

programme.title: Into the White
programme.desc: Norway, WWII. A group of British and German soldiers find themselves stranded in the wild after an aircraft battle. Finding shelter in the same cabin, they realise there is only one way to survive.

programme.title: Freight
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: Laura and Tyler are two girls who like to party - drink, drugs and general debauchery infuse their days while their careers and lives remain on hold. programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Testament Of Youth
programme.desc: Testament of Youth is a powerful story of love, war and remembrance, based on the First World War best selling memoir by Vera Brittain, which has become the classic testimony of that war from a woman’s point of view. Staring Kit Harrington (Game of Thrones) and Alicia Vikander (Ex Machina). The film was produced by the legendary David Heyman (Harry Potter, Paddington and Gravity). The film follows a searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again, it’s a film about young love, the futility of war and how to make sense of the darkest times.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Love & Friendship
programme.desc: Based on the Jane Austen novella ‘Lady Susan’ set in the high society of the 1790s, acclaimed writer-director Whit Stillman’s film is an exquisitely witty and devious comedy of matchmaking and heartbreaking. Beautiful widow Lady Susan Vernon visits the estate of her in-laws to wait out the colorful rumors about her dalliances circulating through polite society. While ensconced there, she attracts the simultaneous attentions of the young, handsome Reginald DeCourcy, the rich and silly Sir James Martin, and the divinely attractive but married Lord Manwaring, complicating matters severely. But as always, Lady Susan has a plan. With a note-perfect ensemble cast, Love & Friendship is a fresh, disruptive, and frequently hilarious take on the traditional period drama. Featuring a revelatory turn from Kate Beckinsale as the duplicitous – but thoroughly charming – Lady Susan Vernon, here is the sharpest and wittiest Jane Austen adaptation to grace the screen.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Liability
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: Coriolanus is een Romeinse militair die niet kan aarden in de Romeinse samenleving. Coriolanus’ tirannieke moeder dwingt hem om de politiek in te gaan. Hij hengelt naar een zetel in de Senaat, maar moet daarvoor uiteraard in de genade van het volk komen. Omdat het publiek hem geen steun gunt, ontketent hij in z’n woede een rel die tot zijn verbanning van Rome leidt.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The extraordinary and epic true story of Eric Lomax, a British Army officer who is tormented as a prisoner of war at a Japanese labour camp during World War II. Decades later, Lomax and his beautiful love interest, Patti, discover that the Japanese interpreter responsible for much of his treatment is still alive. They set out to confront him, and Eric's haunting past, in this powerful and inspiring tale of heroism, humanity and the redeeming power of love.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: A Medieval 'Magnificent Seven', that combines the visceral, stylized action of '300' with the impassioned heroism and romance of 'Braveheart'. Starring James Purefoy (Solomon Kane), Brian Cox (The Bourne Supremacy), and Paul Giamatti (Shoot 'Em Up), IRONCLAD is an ultra-violent action thriller that tells the true story of a motley crew of tough, battle hardened warriors, who withstood several brutal and bloody months under siege, in a desperate bid to defend their country's freedom...
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Testament Of Youth
programme.desc: Testament of Youth is a powerful story of love, war and remembrance, based on the First World War best selling memoir by Vera Brittain, which has become the classic testimony of that war from a woman’s point of view. programme.title: The Dinosaur Project
programme.desc: In this special effects thriller, a film crew in the Congo discover a lost world filled with terrifying, giant creatures thought extinct for millions of years.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: A talking cat, a pack of intelligent rats, and a fake pied piper work together scamming villages by charging them for dealing with staged plagues of rats, until one of their targets winds up having a far more sinister secret than their own.

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: 1920s London, English writer, Virginia Woolf (Elizabeth Debicki), has reached the apex of modern world literature with her landmark novel, 'Mrs. Dalloway', but nothing seems to soothe the darkness that plagues her. Poems and letters of admiration from Vita Sackville-West (Gemma Arterton) lead to a courtship that is hardly concealed from the outside world. Soon, Virginia is enthralled by Vita. She is everything Virginia is not –extroverted, direct, in possession of a strongly magnetic personality and, as Virginia notes, a pair of the most "amazing legs". Focusing on the period 1927-1928 during which time Woolf wrote 'Orlando', the novel their relationship inspired, Vita & Virginia is a moving and exhilarating feature from actor and writer Dame Eileen Atkins.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: A Promise
programme.desc: Set against the outbreak of World War I, 'A Promise' centres on Lotte Hoffmeister (Rebecca Hall of 'The Awakening') a married woman who falls in love with her husband’s protégé, Friedrich Zeitz (Richard Madden of 'Game of Thrones'). Bound by duty and divided by the impending war, the young lovers pledge their devotion to each other in spite of what their future holds. Adapted from Stefan Zweig’s novel 'Journey into the Past' and directed by Patrice Leconte ('The Girl on the Bridge', 'Man on the Train'), 'A Promise' is a passionate and romantic drama about forbidden love.

programme.title: The Descent: Part 2
programme.desc: Distraught, confused, and half-wild with fear, Sarah Carter emerges alone from the Appalachian cave system where she encountered unspeakable terrors. Unable to plausibly explain to the authorities what happened - or why she's covered in her friends' blood - Sarah is forced back to the subterranean depths to help locate her five missing companions.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug (David Tennant) and Abi (Rosamund Pike) and their three children travel to the Scottish Highlands for Doug's father Gordie's (Billy Connolly) birthday party. It's soon clear that when it comes to keeping a secret under wraps from the rest of the family, their children are their biggest liability…
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Vita & Virginia
programme.desc: 1920s London, English writer, Virginia Woolf (Elizabeth Debicki), has reached the apex of modern world literature with her landmark novel, 'Mrs. Dalloway', but nothing seems to soothe the darkness that plagues her. Poems and letters of admiration from Vita Sackville-West (Gemma Arterton) lead to a courtship that is hardly concealed from the outside world. Soon, Virginia is enthralled by Vita. She is everything Virginia is not –extroverted, direct, in possession of a strongly magnetic personality and, as Virginia notes, a pair of the most "amazing legs". Focusing on the period 1927-1928 during which time Woolf wrote 'Orlando', the novel their relationship inspired, Vita & Virginia is a moving and exhilarating feature from actor and writer Dame Eileen Atkins.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mr. Turner
programme.desc: Mr. Turner explores the last quarter century of the great if eccentric British painter J.M.W. Turner (1775-1851).Profoundly affected by the death of his father, loved by a housekeeper he takes for granted and occasionally exploits sexually, he forms a close relationship with a seaside landlady with whom he eventually lives incognito in Chelsea, where he dies. Throughout this, he travels, paints, stays with the country aristocracy, visits brothels, is a popular if anarchic member of the Royal Academy of Arts, has himself strapped to the mast of a ship so that he can paint a snowstorm, and is both celebrated and reviled by the public and by royalty.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: Academy Award® nominee Ian McKellen takes on the iconic role of Detective Sherlock Holmes in this exciting new twist on the world’s most famous detective. In 1947, the world famous sleuth has retired to a remote Sussex farmhouse, living in relative anonymity with only his housekeeper Mrs Munro and her young son, Roger, for company. Grappling with the diminishing powers of his mind — and frustrated with the misrepresentation of him in Watson’s best-selling novels — he diverts his attention to an unsolved case. As the mystery deepens, Sherlock tries desperately to recall the events of 30 years ago that ultimately led to his retirement.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Apocalypse Clown
programme.desc: When a celestial incident causes mass societal collapse, a misfit troupe of clowns seize the chance to revive their showbiz dreams and put on a show.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: Virgil Oldman is a world renowned antiques expert. One day he receives a phone call from the mysterious Claire who asks him to evaluate some family works of art. It will be the beginning of a relationship that will change his life forever.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: Jim Broadbent and Ruth Sheen star in Mike Leigh's Oscar and BAFTA-nominated comedy-drama about a contented couple and their less fortunate friends and family. Strong language.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: Mary Shelley tells the story of Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, author of the famous Gothic novels "Frankenstein", and her fiery relationship with renowned romantic poet Percy Bysshe Shelley. The pair are two outsiders constrained by society but bound together by progressive ideas that are beyond the boundaries of their age and time.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Harry Brown
programme.desc: An elderly retired marine takes the law into his own hands when his friend is murdered by hoodlums on a London estate.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Living
programme.desc: This is the story of an ordinary man, reduced by years of oppressive office routine to a shadow existence, who at the eleventh hour makes a supreme effort to turn his dull life into something wonderful.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Attack The Block
programme.desc: Cult sci-fi comedy starring Jodie Whittaker, John Boyega, Nick Frost and Luke Treadaway. Bonfire night, South London. Sam, a trainee nurse, is making her way home when she's accosted by a gang of hooded teenage thugs demanding her wallet and phone. That is until a huge, flaming meteorite crash-lands into a nearby car. Sam makes her escape while the gang find themselves confronted by a rabid, ravenous extra-terrestrial with a craving for human flesh. Having killed the creature they soon realise that this is only the beginning. There are other aliens invading the earth and they're bigger, stronger and hungrier. Their only chance of survival is to take refuge within the concrete walls of their housing estate block. Teaming up with their initial victim Sam and local dealer Ron, the neighbourhood's biggest threat soon realise they could be the block's only hope. It's inner city versus outer space and it's about to get nasty.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: Adapted by Ian McEwan from his bestselling novel, the drama centers on a young couple of drastically different backgrounds in the summer of 1962. Following the pair through their idyllic courtship, this movie explores sex and the societal pressure that can accompany physical intimacy, leading to an awkward and fateful wedding night.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Drama depicting the relationship between golfing champions Old Tom Morris and his son.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: Inspired by the true story of Dido Elizabeth Belle, this powerful film stars Gugu Mbatha-Raw as the mixed-race daughter of a British Navy officer raised by her wealthy great-uncle and his wife. Although racism prevents her from enjoying the full advantages of her upbringing, Belle’s love for an idealistic young man sparks change that may impact generations to come.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: Based on Peter Turner's memoir, the film follows the playful but passionate relationship between Turner and the eccentric Academy Award-Winning Actress Gloria Grahame in 1978 Liverpool. What starts as a vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deeper relationship, with Turner being the person Gloria turns to for comfort. Their passion and lust for life is tested to the limits by events beyond their control.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: Oranges and Sunshine tells the real-life story of Margaret Humphreys, a social worker from Nottingham, who uncovered one of the most significant social scandals in recent times: the organised deportation of children in care from the United Kingdom to Australia. Almost single-handedly, against overwhelming odds and with little regard for her own well-being, Margaret reunited thousands of families.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Lollipop
programme.desc: Molly, a young woman recently released from prison, struggles to regain custody of her children. Joining forces with her childhood friend Amina, they take destiny into their own hands.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Almond and the Seahorse
programme.desc: What happens when you're ambushed by time? An archaeologist and an architect fight to re-imagine a future after traumatic brain injury leaves them adrift from the people they love.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: The Descent
programme.desc: A woman goes on vacation with her friends after her husband and daughter encounter a tragic accident. One year later she goes hiking with her friends and they get trapped in the cave. With a lack of supply, they struggle to survive and they meet strange blood thirsty creatures.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Pin Cushion
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, socially awkward Iona and her cat-obsessed mother Lyn move to a new town. Together the pair put on a brave face, finding and creating comfort as one another’s sole friend. However, life begins to get tricky after the town’s small-minded denizens reveal themselves to be as petty and cruel as those from the town they just fled. At school, Iona finds herself targeted by a trio of mean girls who exploit her naïveté. Across town, Lyn attempts to make friends and is flatly rejected by a knitting circle of mean women who find her very existence repugnant. Daughter and mother find refuge in an elaborate fantasy world founded on denial and delusion; ultimately distance between them just when they need each other most.
programme.country: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Major League
programme.desc: The new owner of the Cleveland Indians puts together a team of misfits so they'll lose and she can move them to Miami. When they uncover the plot, they decide to teach her a lesson and start winning.
